scope: PR-017A API smoke and testability documentation
pnpm smoke:api root and api package scripts
apps/api/src/smoke/api-smoke.ts authenticated API journey on ephemeral loopback port
synthetic smoke data cleanup for generated users and asset
docs/testing.md public-safe testing and smoke guidance
README and execution-plan updates for the no-UI testability gate
residualRisk: Approved with risk: the independent reviewer found no blocker. Deterministic worker/consumer signals are false positives because the file is a sequential HTTP smoke script, not an event worker or consumer. no-test-file-changed is accepted because this PR introduces an executable smoke command and the workspace test suite plus smoke were run against real local Postgres. package-manifest-without-lockfile is accepted because package.json changes add scripts only, with no dependency or lockfile change expected. The remaining operational risk is that pnpm smoke:api must be kept as an explicit gate before UI work until it is wired into CI.
